title: The Truce between 'Al! and Mu'awiyah 121 The Organization of the Military Units (Katd'ib) and Preparation of the Troops for Battle
description: The Truce between 'Al! and Mu'awiyah 121 The Organization of the Military Units (Katd'ib) and Preparation of the Troops for Battle. Recorded under the year 37 AH (657–658 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 17.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 17
